name: Green Tomato & Onion Pickles
recipeIngredient: 4 quarts Green tomatoes, cut into half-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the granulated sugar, cider vinegar, and salt in a kettle.
2. Tie the whole allspice and whole cloves in a cheesecloth bag.
3. Add the tied spices to the kettle.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil.
5. Add the green tomato and onion slices to the boiling liquid.
6. Continue boiling, uncovered, for 5 minutes or until the slices are just tender. Lift the slices from the bottom of the pot to the surface with a fork during cooking.
7. Drain the pickles, reserving the liquid.
8. Remove the cheesecloth bag and pack the pickles into clean, hot jars.
9. Reheat the reserved liquid to boiling.
10. Pour the boiling liquid over the pickles in the jars.
11. Seal the jars, adjusting the lids as directed by the manufacturer.
12. Process the sealed jars in a hot water bath for the appropriate time based on your conditions (contact your local extension agent for specific information).
